title: DMT: Dream Dealer Trip
description:
DMT: Dream Dealer is a first person exploration game were you enter your dreams and start a long journey between worlds.

You'll never know if what you see is real, or if you are in trance. 

An experimental game made to delight your sensory system. 

Surreal game inspirate in titles like: The Stanley Parable, Dear Esther... were the principal objective is to show what mind isn't able to imagine.



The story is explained by inner thoughts that will guide you through your dreams. 



Sometimes they will try to confuse and deceive you...
description_short: DMT: Dream Dealer is a walking simulator that guides you trough a trip between worlds. You'll never know if what you see is real, or if you are in a trance. A game made to delight your sensory system, inspired by titles like The Stanley Parable, Dear Esther, Gone Home...
